Author: Your Server's Dealer
Name: Chat Casino
Description: A fully-featured casino plugin for FFXIV. Commands: /casino to open the player view, /casino dealer for the dealer panel. Players use > commands in /party chat to play. Features blackjack, poker, roulette, craps, baccarat, chocobo racing, and Ultima!
Punchline: Play casino games with your friends in FFXIV!
